one_liner: Pipedrive is a sales CRM offering a broad REST API secured via personal API tokens or OAuth 2.0, with self-serve token access on any paid plan and both official and community MCP servers available.

auth_methods.notes: Personal API token passed via x-api-token header; tied to a single user/company, only one active token at a time.
Required for apps published in the Pipedrive Marketplace; standard authorization code flow with access/refresh tokens via Bearer header.

self_serve_notes: No permanent free tier, but a 14-day free trial is available for all plans, and every paid plan includes REST API access. Personal API tokens can be self-generated instantly from Settings > Personal preferences > API. Rate limits scale with subscription tier; higher limits require plan upgrade or token top-up purchase.

api_surface.notes: Extensive REST API (v1 and v2) covering deals, persons, organizations, activities, pipelines, products, leads, projects, webhooks, etc.

evidence.supports: API token via x-api-token header and OAuth 2.0 requirement for marketplace apps
OAuth 2.0 authorization, token, and refresh endpoints
No permanent free tier; 14-day free trial for all plans
REST API included with paid subscription plans
Rate limits scale by subscription tier; upgrade or top-up for higher limits
Official Node.js API client library demonstrating broad REST API surface

flags: No permanent free tier - requires trial or paid plan for API access
MCP server ecosystem includes both official and multiple community implementations with varying tool counts/features
